positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring a bioluminescent fox curled up amongst stylized glowing mushrooms and whimsical ferns. The fox should have a clean, strong silhouette and be centered. The overall aesthetic should be deep navy blue and emerald green color palette, contrasted with vibrant pops of cyan and neon yellow from the bioluminescence. Style: Neo-folk art, woodcut illustration with modern digital polish. Composition: Central, symmetrical, suitable for large apparel print. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic backlighting emphasizing glowing elements. Details: Highly detailed flora, clean linework, vector-art quality, perfect symmetry.
